title: Provide information to customers
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide information to customers demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Assess the request for information and/or advice

pcs.text: Clarify and confirm the source, nature and priority of the request
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify and confirm the source, nature and priority of the request?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify and confirm the source, nature and priority of the request.

pcs.text: Record the receipt of the request in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the receipt of the request in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the receipt of the request in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess the request for information and/or advice

elements.title: Prepare response

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and obtain required information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and obtain required information.

pcs.text: Decide whether to obtain or generate additional information given the priority and costs involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Decide whether to obtain or generate additional information given the priority and costs involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Decide whether to obtain or generate additional information given the priority and costs involved.

pcs.text: Seek required approval/authority to release information before proceeding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek required approval/authority to release information before proceeding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek required approval/authority to release information before proceeding.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare response

elements.title: Provide information and/or advice

pcs.text: Ensure that information is accurate, relevant and complies with workplace/statutory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that information is accurate, relevant and complies with workplace/statutory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that information is accurate, relevant and complies with workplace/statutory requirements.

pcs.text: Keep the customer informed of progress when it is not possible to answer immediately
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep the customer informed of progress when it is not possible to answer immediately?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep the customer informed of progress when it is not possible to answer immediately.

pcs.text: Notify other relevant personnel of request and response in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify other relevant personnel of request and response in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify other relevant personnel of request and response in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Use most appropriate communication method given priority, cost and customer facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use most appropriate communication method given priority, cost and customer facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use most appropriate communication method given priority, cost and customer facilities.

pcs.text: Provide information in a format suitable to customer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide information in a format suitable to customer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information in a format suitable to customer.

pcs.text: Check that the response met the customer's needs and take appropriate actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that the response met the customer's needs and take appropriate actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that the response met the customer's needs and take appropriate actions.

pcs.text: Deal with customers politely, efficiently and appropriately, and in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Deal with customers politely, efficiently and appropriately, and in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deal with customers politely, efficiently and appropriately, and in accordance with workplace procedures.
